inputs.label: Carbohydrate Intake (g)
inputs.businessContext: Total grams of carbohydrate in the meal to be covered by insulin

businessContext_i18n.en: Total grams of carbohydrate in the meal to be covered by insulin
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnsülin ile karşılanacak öğündeki toplam karbonhidrat gramı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgramm Kohlenhydrate in der Mahlzeit, die durch Insulin abgedeckt werden sollen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes totaux de glucides dans le repas à couvrir par l'insuline
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos totales de carbohidratos en la comida a cubrir con insulina

inputs.label: Current Blood Glucose (mg/dL)
inputs.businessContext: Measured blood glucose level before meal

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured blood glucose level before meal
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yemek öncesi ölçülen kan şekeri seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de glucosa en sangre medido antes de la comida

inputs.label: Target Blood Glucose (mg/dL)
inputs.businessContext: Desired blood glucose level after correction

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired blood glucose level after correction
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düzeltme sonrası istenen kan şekeri seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de glucosa en sangre deseado después de la corrección

inputs.label: Carbohydrate Ratio (g/U)
inputs.businessContext: Grams of carbohydrate covered by one unit of rapid-acting insulin

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams of carbohydrate covered by one unit of rapid-acting insulin
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ünite hızlı etkili insülinin karşıladığı karbonhidrat gramı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gramm Kohlenhydrate, die von einer Einheit schnell wirkendem Insulin abgedeckt werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Grammes de glucides couverts par une unité d'insuline rapide
businessContext_i18n.es: Gramos de carbohidratos cubiertos por una unidad de insulina de acción rápida

inputs.label: Insulin Sensitivity Factor (mg/dL/U)
inputs.businessContext: Expected drop in blood glucose per unit of rapid-acting insulin

label_i18n.es: Factor de sensibilidad a la insulina (mg/dL/U)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected drop in blood glucose per unit of rapid-acting insulin
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ünite hızlı etkili insülin başına beklenen kan şekeri düşüşü
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Blutzuckerabfall pro Einheit schnell wirkendem Insulin
businessContext_i18n.fr: Baisse attendue de la glycémie par unité d'insuline rapide
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída esperada de glucosa en sangre por unidad de insulina de acción rápida
